meaning: n.[医]瞳孔放大剂,散瞳剂adj.瞳孔放大的
examples: The mydriatic drop is safe to the senile patients.
Methods: Analysis was done with mydriatic and computer optometry to measure corneal curvature and determine the length of the optic axis.
Conclusion 1% cyclopentolate hydrochloride can apply for mydriatic optometry in children aged 312 with myopia because of its safety and efficiency.
